content:
🚀 mcp-toolbox | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enable AI agents and applications to interact with and query enterprise databases through the Model Context Protocol (MCP), offering both out-of-the-box functionality and a platform for custom tool development.
✨ Key Features: • Open-source MCP server for databases • Connects AI agents, IDEs, and applications to enterprise databases
📖 Summary: MCP Toolbox for Databases is an open-source Go-based server that bridges AI agents, IDEs, and applications with enterprise databases. It offers both a ready-to-use MCP server with prebuilt tools for immediate data interaction and a framework for building custom, secure AI tools with specific logic.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
